title: mumei dashboard trend payloads
description: Three trend payloads served by dashboard/server/trends.ts. Producer: dashboard backend (cost-log.jsonl + reviews/*.json + .hook-stats.jsonl, active + archive merged). Consumer: dashboard/src/hooks/useTrend{Tokens,Reviews,Hooks}.ts.

TokensTrend.description: GET /api/trends/tokens?days=14 result. Daily total of input + output tokens from cost-log.jsonl. Days with no entries are emitted as v=0.

ReviewsTrend.description: GET /api/trends/reviews?days=14 result. Daily count of review JSON files grouped by verdict.

HooksTrend.description: GET /api/trends/hooks?topN=10&windowH=24 result. Top-N hook_id rows by firing count within the window.

hook_id.description: Hook rule short id emitted by hooks/_lib/hook-stats.sh:mumei_hook_stats_record (e.g. S1, M1, X3, I1).

decision.description: Most common decision recorded for the hook_id within the window.
